issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page — per CORE RULES Rule 5, listing pages must be rejected
Source is a container/index page with no standalone analytical content
event_type set to 'unknown' — no valid event_type applies to a listing page
published_at is empty — listing page covers entire 2023 calendar year but has no specific publication date
Source is stale — all content is from 2023, approximately 2+ years before TODAY (2026-03-31)
Cannot extract meaningful market structure or macro catalyst signals from an index page
No verifiable claims to check — source aggregates dozens of unrelated announcements
human_review_reason: Record already contains accurate self-assessment; rejection is clear-cut per Rule 5

corrected_fields.summary: This is an index/listing page aggregating all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2023. It is not a single document but rather a chronological enumeration of dozens of distinct announcements including FOMC minutes, enforcement actions, regulatory proposals, banking applications, and other administrative matters. The page is not directly relevant for targeted macro catalyst or market structure analysis as it lacks the depth and specificity of individual documents.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This listing page serves only as a finding aid to locate individual Fed press releases. It has no standalone analytical value for macro catalyst or market structure research. Researchers should access the specific FOMC minutes, rate decisions, or regulatory documents directly rather than this index.
